inputText: Dear customer, electricity connection will be disconnected at 9:30 PM tonight because your previous month bill was not updated. Call electricity officer 90012-34567 immediately.
explanation: Electricity boards do not send personal SMS messages threatening disconnection tonight or ask you to call personal mobile numbers to resolve unpaid bills. inputText: Dear customer, your bank account is suspended due to pending KYC verification. Please call bank manager at 98765-43210 immediately to update.
explanation: Banks never threaten to block your account or demand KYC/PAN updates urgently via SMS links. This is a common identity theft trick.
